## Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Configure '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens?

## Environment

- Component: [e.g., VLAN, Firewall, Sentinel, VPN]
- OS: [e.g., Windows Server 2019, UniFi OS]
- Version: [e.g., 7.3.0]
- Network: [e.g., VLAN 10, VLAN 20]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or diagrams.

## Security Impact

- [ ] Critical (Immediate action required)
- [ ] High (Fix within 1 week)
- [ ] Medium (Fix within 1 month)
- [ ] Low (Backlog)

## Additional Context

Add any other context here.

## Related Issues

Link to related issues if applicable.

## Proposed Fix

If you have a suggested solution, describe it here.
